name: zujuan-scraper
description: 组卷网爬虫工具 - 从zujuan.xkw.com爬取数学题目

scripts.postinstall: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),path=require('path'),os=require('os');const pkgDir=path.dirname(require.resolve('./package.json'));const destDir=path.join(os.homedir(),'.zujuan-scraper');if(!fs.existsSync(destDir))fs.mkdirSync(destDir,{recursive:true});['KNOWLEDGE_TREE_HIGH.txt','KNOWLEDGE_TREE_MIDDLE.txt'].forEach(f=>{const src=path.join(pkgDir,f);const dst=path.join(destDir,f);if(fs.existsSync(src)){fs.copyFileSync(src,dst);console.log('[postinstall] copied:',f);}else{console.error('[postinstall] 文件不存在，跳过:', src);}});"
